data.title: Company raises $60M through private placement in Q2.
data.description: According to recent reports, the current global population stands at approximately 7.6 billion people. Recent data also reveals that over 3.5 billion people, approximately 46% of the global population, are active internet users. The number of social media users has risen to over 3 billion, with more than 1 million new users joining social media platforms every day. The use of mobile devices continues to increase, with over 5 billion unique mobile users reported worldwide. Additionally, the global e-commerce industry has seen significant growth, reaching a total worth of $3.5 trillion in revenue, with expectations of continued expansion in the coming years.

data.title: Precision Drilling Announces 2026 First Quarter Unaudited Financial Statements
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Calgary, Alberta, a news release was issued containing forward-looking information and statements as per applicable securities laws. The release includes references to specific Financial Measures and Ratios such as Adjusted EBITDA, Net Capital Spending, Working Capital, and Total Long-Term Financial Liabilities. Adjusted EBITDA covers earnings before income taxes, (gain) loss on investments and other assets, finance charges, foreign exchange, gain on asset disposals, and depreciation and amortization. These terms lack standardized meanings under IFRS Accounting Standards, making comparisons with other companies challenging. For a comprehensive understanding of the risks associated with the forward-looking information and statements, refer to the "Cautionary Statement Regarding Forward-Looking Information and Statements" section in the release.

data.title: Multi-Destination Travel Surges Across Asia-Pacific This Labour Day, Trip.com Group Data Shows
data.description: In the Asia-Pacific region, multi-city travel experienced a significant 35% increase compared to the previous year. This growth in multi-city trips surpassed the growth in single-destination travel by more than double. Southeast Asia notably saw robust double-digit growth, with Thailand specifically showing a notable increase of up to 52% year-on-year. This data was announced in Singapore on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Expanding Infrastructure for the Age of AI Commerce: Ant International Connects Over 150 Million Merchants With More Than 2 Billion Consumers
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, Ant International announced at its premier forum that it facilitates connections between 150 million merchants and over 2 billion user accounts worldwide.

data.title: Adya Announces Delay in Filing Year End 2025 Financial Statements and MD&A
data.description: In Toronto, Adya, Inc. (TSX-V: ADYA; OTCQB: ADYIF) has disclosed a temporary postponement in submitting its audited financial statements, management’s discussion and analysis (MD&A), and CEO and CFO certificates for the year ending December 31, 2025. The deadline for the filing was April 30, 2026. This delay is a result of switching to a new auditor and not due to unresolved accounting issues or disputes.

data.title: Mesoblast announces $30.3m revenue from Ryoncil® and cuts cash spend to $4.1m for the quarter.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 5.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of 4.8% growth. This growth was primarily driven by a 7.3% increase in consumer spending, which marked the highest growth rate in the past two years. Additionally, business investment rose by 6.1%, contributing to the overall economic expansion. Unemployment rate also dropped to 3.9%, the lowest level in a decade. Analysts attribute the strong economic performance to government stimulus measures and increased consumer confidence. Looking ahead, experts predict continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: Diamond Certified Resource Celebrates 25 Years of Quality Ratings With the Release of the 2026 Diamond Certified Directory to 840,000 Households
data.description: The recently released Diamond Certified Directory showcases detailed rating profiles of highly rated local businesses across the Greater San Francisco Bay Area. Based in PETALUMA, California, the Diamond Certified Resource is commemorating its 25th anniversary of aiding consumers in discovering top-rated service providers. The directory includes information on companies that have met strict certification criteria and have received exceptional customer feedback.

data.title: Solar Alliance Provides Update on Outstanding Continuous Disclosure Filings
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Solar Alliance Energy Inc. reported its inability to submit audited annual financial statements for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. As a result, the related management discussion and analysis, along with CEO and CFO certifications, have also not been prepared. Consequently, it is anticipated that a cease trade order ("CTO") will be enforced on May 1, 2026. Upon the issuance of the CTO, trading on the TSXV will halt, and shareholders will not be permitted to trade the company's securities.
